testcase.name: test_print_integer_no_decimal
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:6: in test_print_integer_no_decimal assert run("print(5);") == "5\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_arithmetic_precedence
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:10: in test_arithmetic_precedence assert run("print(1 + 2 * 3);") == "7\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_subtraction_and_unary_minus
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:15: in test_subtraction_and_unary_minus assert run("print(10 - 3);") == "7\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_float_division
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:20: in test_float_division assert run("print(3 / 2);") == "1.5\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_modulo
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:24: in test_modulo assert run("print(7 % 3);") == "1\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_string_concat
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:33: in test_string_concat assert run('print("hi" + " " + "you");') == "hi you\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_compare_numbers
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:37: in test_compare_numbers assert run("print(1 < 2, 2 < 1);") == "true false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_compare_equal_unlike_types_is_false
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:41: in test_compare_equal_unlike_types_is_false assert run('print(1 == "1");') == "false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_logical_short_circuit_returns_operand
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:46: in test_logical_short_circuit_returns_operand assert run('print(true && "x");') == "x\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_negation_returns_bool
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:52: in test_negation_returns_bool assert run("print(!true, !false, !0, !1);") == "false true true false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_nil_prints_as_nil
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:56: in test_nil_prints_as_nil assert run("print(nil);") == "nil\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_bool_prints_as_lowercase
testcase.failure: tests/test_eval_basic.py:60: in test_bool_prints_as_lowercase assert run("print(true, false);") == "true false\n" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:123: in run return evaluator.run(source) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/evaluator.py:14: in run ast = parse(tokens) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['EOF'] == ['KEYWORD', '...'NUMBER', ...]
At index 0 diff: 'EOF' != 'KEYWORD' Right contains 7 more items, first extra item: 'IDENT' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:20: in test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2 assert kinds(toks) == [ E AssertionError: assert ['EOF'] == ['KEYWORD', '...'NUMBER', ...] E E At index 0 diff: 'EOF' != 'KEYWORD' E Right contains 7 more items, first extra item: 'IDENT' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_keywords_vs_identifiers

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['EOF'] == ['KEYWORD', '...ORD', 'IDENT']
At index 0 diff: 'EOF' != 'KEYWORD' Right contains 3 more items, first extra item: 'IDENT' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:28: in test_keywords_vs_identifiers assert kinds(toks)[:4] == ["KEYWORD", "IDENT", "KEYWORD", "IDENT"] E AssertionError: assert ['EOF'] == ['KEYWORD', '...ORD', 'IDENT'] E E At index 0 diff: 'EOF' != 'KEYWORD' E Right contains 3 more items, first extra item: 'IDENT' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_multi_char_punct

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['==', '!=', ...', '&&', '||']
Right contains 6 more items, first extra item: '==' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:37: in test_multi_char_punct assert [t.value for t in toks if t.kind == "PUNCT"] == ["==", "!=", "<=", ">=", "&&", "||"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['==', '!=', ...', '&&', '||'] E E Right contains 6 more items, first extra item: '==' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_single_char_punct_after_multi

failure.message: assert False + where False = any(<generator object test_single_char_punct_after_multi.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x10b0c7ed0>)

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:46: in test_single_char_punct_after_multi assert any(t.kind == "PUNCT" and t.value == "=" for t in toks) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object test_single_char_punct_after_multi.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x10b0c7ed0>)

testcase.name: test_string_escapes

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:51: in test_string_escapes s = [t for t in toks if t.kind == "STRING"][0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_comments_stripped

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['x', 'y']
Right contains 2 more items, first extra item: 'x' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:59: in test_comments_stripped assert idents == ["x", "y"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['x', 'y'] E E Right contains 2 more items, first extra item: 'x' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_line_col_tracking

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:65: in test_line_col_tracking x_tok = toks[1] ^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_unknown_char_errors
testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:72: in test_unknown_char_errors with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'Exception'>

testcase.name: test_number_and_float

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: ../phase_01/tests/test_lexer.py:84: in test_number_and_float assert nums[0] == 42.0 ^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_let_stmt
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:9: in test_let_stmt p = parse("let x = 1;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_precedence_mul_before_add
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:18: in test_precedence_mul_before_add p = parse("let x = 1 + 2 * 3;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_comparison_and_logical
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:29: in test_comparison_and_logical p = parse("x = 1 < 2 && y;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_if_else
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:39: in test_if_else p = parse("if (x) { let a = 1; } else { let b = 2; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_while_with_break_continue
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:47: in test_while_with_break_continue p = parse("while (x) { break; continue; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_fn_decl_is_fndecl_not_letstmt
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:55: in test_fn_decl_is_fndecl_not_letstmt p = parse("fn add(a, b) { return a + b; }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_fn_lit_in_let
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:65: in test_fn_lit_in_let p = parse("let f = fn(x) { return x; };") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_list_and_dict_literals
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:72: in test_list_and_dict_literals p = parse('let xs = [1, 2, 3,]; let d = {"a": 1, "b": 2};') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_call_and_index_chain
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:82: in test_call_and_index_chain p = parse("f(1, 2)[0];") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_assign_to_index
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:89: in test_assign_to_index p = parse("xs[1] = 9;") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_for_stmt_one_and_two_names
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:102: in test_for_stmt_one_and_two_names p1 = parse("for (x) in xs { }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'

testcase.name: test_else_if_chain_parses
testcase.failure: ../phase_02/tests/test_parser.py:112: in test_else_if_chain_parses p = parse("if (a) { } else if (b) { } else { }") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:306: in parse return parser.parse() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:23: in parse while not self.is_at_end(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tinylang/parser.py:289: in is_at_end return self.peek().type == 'EOF' ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Token' object has no attribute 'type'
